file_name: Questionnaire - Lawrence and Hanson - Gordon Macdonald.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Lawrence & Hanson and Gordon Macdonald are close competitors and there are not many alternatives in the relevant geographic region or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business, including any commercial relationships with Lawrence & Hanson and/or Gordon Macdonald.
